title: 24pcs Happy Birthday Foil Balloons - 18" Inch Round Helium Mylar Party Balloon for Birthday Parties Decorations
features: Celebratory Decoration: These 18 inch birthday foil balloons are perfect for adding a festive touch to birthday parties and celebrations.
Vibrant Design: The birthday balloons feature a bright and colourful 'Happy Birthday' design, printed on 18-inch (45.72 cm) round mylar balloons.
Versatile Usage: Suitable for indoor and outdoor decorations, these balloons can be inflated with helium or air.
Easy Setup: Simply inflate the balloons and arrange them as desired for an eye-catching display.
Party Essential: A must-have item for creating a memorable and joyful birthday atmosphere.
description: Product description Celebrate in style with these vibrant Foil Balloons! Measuring 18" (45.72cm) in diameter, these round birthday mylar balloons are the perfect addition to any birthday party decor. Inflate them with helium or air for a festive touch that will make the occasion truly memorable. Whether you're decorating a home, office, or venue, these balloons will bring a burst of joy and colour. Lightweight and easy to handle, they are an essential party supply for creating a fun and lively atmosphere. Elevate your birthday celebrations with this delightful set of foil balloons. Safety Warning Children can choke or suffocate on uninflated or broken balloons. Keep uninflated balloons away from children. Discard broken balloons at once.
